name: header-editor-pro-free
description: Professional HTTP header editor for web developers, API testing, and debugging - completely free with unlimited profiles

scripts.create-source-package: zip -r source-code.zip src/ package*.json rspack.config.js BUILD_INSTRUCTIONS.md README.md
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run create-source-package && cd dist && zip -r ../extension.zip .
